capacity_context.policy: Scarce human review capacity is reserved for blocked high-risk work before low-risk bulk refreshes dispatch.

resource_budget_record.value_hypothesis: A bulk summary refresh may improve local readability.
cost_estimate: large batch of low-risk review checks
displaced_costs: high-risk review waits behind the bulk refresh
resource_budget_record.escalation_rule: Escalate only if the queue fully fails.

non_claims: Does not promote any support state.
Does not prove scheduler behavior, runtime behavior, load stability, review-queue optimization, or economic outcomes.
